test.note: Exit code 1 from 9 pre-existing failing test files (Playwright, Deno, empty suites). 49 files passing, 407 tests passing, 2 tests failing (both pre-existing connectionValidator assertion failures). Back to baseline from round 1: StudioRightPanel.test.tsx now passes (timeout fix applied). Delta from baseline: 0 new failures.

lint.note: Exit code 1 from 769 lint problems (704 errors, 65 warnings). Same count as round 1. All consistent with established codebase patterns (no-explicit-any, react-hooks). No new categories introduced.

nonBlockingIssues.description: generate-workflow edge function logs raw user prompt. Consider redacting/truncating user input in production logs for privacy.
handlePromptBlur uses setTimeout(200ms) to delay autocomplete close — brittle on slow devices.
FFmpeg nodes inherit generic Video/Audio port definitions rather than node-specific typed ports. Architecture doesn't support per-node port customization through seed options.
Dead 'rightOffsetPx' prop remains in QueueIndicatorProps interface after removing its usage.
StudioWorkflowLauncher.tsx component file still exists but is no longer imported by production code (only its test file). Dead code.
clearRejection() doesn't remove 'connection-rejected-flash' CSS class from DOM node element. If clearRejection is called before timeout fires, red border persists indefinitely.
Audio preview type is 'json' instead of 'audio', inconsistent with other node kinds (text→'text', image→'image', video→'video').
Combine node pass-through relay only takes first connected input, not combining multiple inputs.
generateAudioNode reads params once at function start and doesn't re-read latest state from store during async generation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit checklist to Edge Functions section: 'EVERY edge function MUST call authenticateRequest(req.headers) unless explicitly designated as public. Import from ../_shared/auth.ts.' This prevents the recurring pattern of workers creating edge functions without authentication.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: generate-workflow edge function (prompt-to-workflow-improvements) was created without authenticateRequest() despite AGENTS.md documenting the pattern. This is the second occurrence — elevenlabs-voices had the same gap flagged in the project-setup scrutiny.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Standardize edge function auth error handling pattern. Currently two patterns exist: (1) dedicated try/catch around authenticateRequest (groq-chat), (2) instanceof AuthError check in main catch block (generate-workflow). Pick one canonical pattern and document it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: supabase/functions/generate-workflow/index.ts uses instanceof AuthError in main catch. supabase/functions/groq-chat/index.ts uses dedicated try/catch. Both work but inconsistency creates confusion for workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention note: 'When removing features or relocating UI components, clean up dead interface props and component files. If a component is no longer imported by production code, either delete it or mark it deprecated with a TODO comment.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: studio-ui-layout-fixes left dead rightOffsetPx prop in QueueIndicator and orphaned StudioWorkflowLauncher.tsx file.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Studio node preview types must follow the kind naming pattern: text→type:"text", image→type:"image", video→type:"video", audio→type:"audio". Do not use type:"json" for node preview data.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: node-processing-audit used type:'json' for Audio preview while all other node kinds use their semantic type string.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance to Coding Conventions: 'Prefer React refs and state over direct DOM manipulation (classList.add/remove, querySelector) in hooks and components. If direct DOM manipulation is necessary, ensure cleanup functions handle both React state and DOM state consistently.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: edge-validation-visual-feedback hook mixes useState with direct DOM classList manipulation, leading to a bug where clearRejection doesn't clean up the CSS class.

rejectedObservations.observation: git root is at /Users/gratitud3 rather than the project directory, causing files to appear as 'new file' in commits even when they existed pre-commit.
rejectedObservations.reason: Environment configuration issue, not a codebase convention. The git repo structure is outside the scope of AGENTS.md and shared state.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skipped agent-browser step for verification.
rejectedObservations.reason: Reasonable adaptation — the changes (auth guard, color hex values, test timeout) are all verifiable through grep/test output. Not a skill gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Commit diff for ffmpeg-nodes-and-descriptions shows all 6 files as 'new file' with full contents rather than incremental changes.
rejectedObservations.reason: Git artifact of how the commit was created (possibly replacing files entirely). Files are tracked correctly. Not a convention issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: nodeConfigs.ts port definitions are separate from palette items and the architecture lacks per-node port customization via seed options.
rejectedObservations.reason: Architectural design decision requiring significant refactor. Already noted as non-blocking issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker used green hex colors matching existing studio palette rather than following AGENTS.md orange/amber convention.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in AGENTS.md as a convention. Root cause is a separate planned cleanup feature (color-hex-cleanup in misc-cleanup-1 milestone). Fixed by fix-generate-workflow-auth feature.
